scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = '../internal/api/dist'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('Cleaned:', path); }"
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const file = path.join('..', 'internal', 'api', 'dist', '.gitkeep'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(file), { recursive: true }); if (!fs.existsSync(file)) { fs.writeFileSync(file, ''); console.log('Ensured:', file); }"
